textByHash.8774318d105b3f7eb248e9e4aed586708779ea4a: I require this one alive human!
textByHash.ff324a8facffef1c43f4b6c9f9664a305f41ce68: No matter. This creature will soon be corrupted and then I will finally have a pawn of my own to manipulate in this world!
textByHash.0bb244481545523616255b3ebe53d0ccea70fa55: Insolent human! You have merely delayed my return to this world. I will find another puppet soon...
textByHash.722764e9299a1b4cd6012d6356f22ba886627b02: Ha!Ha!Ha! You are bold adventurer, but this altar will remain a lingering memento of your decision to challenge me!
textByHash.1279df4fe7dce7172a10151ba861dba815b784b2: I am the void in the universe. I am the answer to all things that cry out for destruction. I am the destroyer of worlds. I am the darkness that swallows the light. Ally to...
